sglang.title: [model] Apertus Tool/Function and Reasoning parser
sglang.author: EduardDurech
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Also extends /separate_reasoning with structured block output so clients can preserve interleaved reasoning and tool-call segments instead of only receiving flattened text


CI States
Latest PR Test (Base): ✅ Run #26946759809
Latest PR Test (Extra): ❌ Run #26946759604

sglang.title: [Spec] Fix fa3 EAGLE draft-decode expand page_table scatter OOB for topk>1 + page_size>1
sglang.author: hnyls2002
sglang.bodyExcerpt: FlashAttentionMultiStepBackend builds the EAGLE draft-decode expand metadata via draft_decode_set_expand_metadata, which scatters compacted page indices into a step-tight (decode_length + 1)-column page_table. The page_size > 1 branch scattered the full num_steps-wide cache_loc instead of slicing it

sglang.title: [debug] Register #27338 EAGLE draft kv_indices revert in pr_fix_toggle
sglang.author: hnyls2002
sglang.bodyExcerpt: pr_fix_toggle lets SGLANG_DEBUG_REVERT_PR=<n> reverse-apply a merged PR's fix for regression A/B testing. #27338 (EAGLE draft cuda-graph kv_indices topk under-allocation) wasn't registered. This adds it: reverting drops the * self.topk from the buffer alloc, so the always-on size invariant #27338 ad

sglang.title: [HiCache] Fix crash when using PP + HiCache L2
sglang.author: stepinto
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
HiCache does not work well with PP.  It leads to server crash.
I have tried to solve the PP + HiCache L2+ L3 in a single patch #27010.  But that patch became larger and larger when I try to deal with UnifiedRadixCache and HybridCacheController.  Let me divide that patch into smaller ones.

sglang.title: Add GB300 base C CI suite
sglang.author: Fridge003
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Summary

Add base-c-test-4-gpu-gb300 to PR Base C and move the former 4-GPU GB200 registrations to GB300.
Add a 4-gpu-gb300 runner config that uses the DeePEP installer with GRACE_BLACKWELL=1.
Thread the grace_blackwell runner config field through PR test stages and /rerun-test dispatch.

Test Plan

sglang.title: Fix flaky test_self_e2e_pd_perturb
sglang.author: fzyzcjy
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
test_self_e2e_pd_perturb.py flaked in CI (e.g. https://github.com/sgl-project/sglang/actions/runs/27040516652/job/79815267923): the P-side perturb fired, but neither side ever reported the asserted verify_real_kv_hash violation (decode-side canary stats showed violations=0 throughout, inc

sglang.title: [NPU] Update documentation for software version upgrades
sglang.author: OrangeRedeng
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation

This pull request updates the documentation and configuration files to support the latest NPU software versions, following the changes introduced in PR #26466. The focus is on improving compatibility with the newest Ascend driver stacks and libraries, as well as updating the installation

sglang.title: [SPEC] fix: import copy module for eagle sampling info clone
sglang.author: alphabetc1
sglang.bodyExcerpt: eagle_info imports the copy function directly, which shadows the copy module name used later in verify. When the filtered sampling-info path calls copy.deepcopy, it raises AttributeError because copy is a function rather than the module. This change imports the copy module so the deepcopy call works

sglang.title: [NPU]Support torch_npu profiler patch API drift
sglang.author: L4-1024
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Summary

add a small torch_npu patch compatibility helper
keep using _apply_patches(patches) when available
fall back to _apply_all_patches() for newer torch_npu versions that removed _apply_patches

Testing

PYTHONPATH=python python -m unittest discover -s test/registered/unit/utils -p 'test_torch_

sglang.title: [Diffusion] Avoid GPU syncs in UniPC scheduler
sglang.author: BBuf
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Summary

Replace torch.tensor(list_of_gpu_scalars) with torch.stack(...) in the UniPC multistep predictor and corrector paths.
Keep the coefficient assembly on-device to avoid implicit GPU-to-CPU synchronization.

Motivation
A Cosmos3 H200 denoising profile showed repeated aten::item / _local_scalar

sglang.title: [diffusion] Fix LingBot-World crash on camera control with ulysses>1
sglang.author: BBuf
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Serving LingBot-World (robbyant/lingbot-world-fast-diffusers, LingBotWorldCausalDMDPipeline) with the documented realtime config — camera control + --ulysses-degree 4 — crashes on every generated chunk:
File ".../models/dits/lingbot_world.py", line 1403, in _prepare_cam_conditioner_scale_

sglang.title: Classify malformed-multimodal rejects as invalid_request
sglang.author: merrymercy
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Summary

When a multimodal request fails validation (e.g. bad base64), return a structured error with type=invalid_request_error and code=400 instead of a bare error message.
Detect client disconnects in the streaming path and exit cleanly instead of emitting a 400.
In the multimodal base processor,

sglang.title: Spec v2 tree drafting (topk>1) with page_size>1
sglang.author: hnyls2002
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Stacked on #26866.
Extends spec v2 (overlap) EAGLE tree drafting (topk > 1) to page_size > 1, and sizes + guards the req_to_token pool for the per-branch holey draft layout.
Summary

Lay out each draft branch's region page-aligned ("holey") and duplicate the prefix partial-tail page into every branc

sglang.title: Route the eager forward path through the CUDA graph input-buffer registry
sglang.author: ch-wan
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
The CUDA graph capture and replay paths already assemble their forward input tensors through CudaGraphBufferRegistry (fill_from → registry buffers), but the eager forward path (forward_decode / forward_extend / forward_idle) still reads its tensors straight off the ForwardBatch. That leav

sglang.title: ci: show partition fit window as a date range in the step summary
sglang.author: hnyls2002
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Summary

The partition step summary printed the live model's lower-bound date as data_as_of=2026-05-30..., which reads as stale — it's the fit window's start (trails today by fit_window_days), not the data's freshness.
Render the full window [start, end) instead, derived from fit_window_start + fit_

sglang.title: [spec] Consolidate the per-decode KV alloc reserve into one helper
sglang.author: hnyls2002
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Summary
Pure refactor, behavior-preserving. Consolidates the per-decode KV allocation sizing into single helpers and moves them next to the allocator they belong with.
Changes

The decode over-allocation 2 * get_alloc_len_per_decode was written out at four sites that must agree -- req_to_token row s

sglang.title: Enable async-assert invariant probes by default in CI
sglang.author: hnyls2002
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
What
Enable the async-assert invariant probes (python/sglang/srt/utils/async_probe.py — NaN / Inf / OOB / page-alignment checks) by default in CI by setting SGLANG_ENABLE_ASYNC_ASSERT next to the existing SGLANG_IS_IN_CI marker. The probes fire torch._assert_async without a GPU->CPU sync, so a viola

sglang.title: Fix MLA EAGLE draft CUDA-graph `kv_indices` under-allocation for `topk > 1`
sglang.author: hnyls2002
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Summary

Widen the multi-step MLA draft CUDA-graph cuda_graph_kv_indices buffer by the missing topk factor (max_bs * max_context_len -> max_bs * topk * max_context_len), matching the eager init_forward_metadata sizing.
Add an always-on size invariant in common_template so an undersized row fails fas

sglang.title: Fix DeepSeek V4 DP reduce scatter when use attention DP + MoE TP
sglang.author: yueming-yuan
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Summary

Use reduce_scatterv for DeepSeek V4's TP-MoE gather return path when DP reduce-scatter is enabled.
Keep the existing dp_scatter path for configurations that do not use DP reduce-scatter.

Root Cause
DeepSeek V4 has a hand-written _use_tp_moe_gather path. In DP attention with TP MoE, the MLP

sglang.title: [Diffusion] Enable Cosmos3 denoising profiling
sglang.author: BBuf
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Summary

Add per-timestep profiler stepping to the custom Cosmos3 denoising loop.
Keep profiler stepping disabled for warmup and non-profile requests.

Motivation
Cosmos3 uses a model-specific denoising loop instead of the generic denoising stage. As a result, --profile --num-profiled-timesteps ...

sglang.title: [NVIDIA] Fix FP8 gemm performance with fp16 models (MInimax-M2.5)
sglang.author: trevor-m
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Performance issue
When using a model with fp16 activations such as Minimax-M2.5 on Blackwell, there is some extra processing of the weight scales at runtime which leads to poor performance.
The issue is as follows:

On blackwell hardware, ENABLE_JIT_DEEPGEMM and DEEPGEMM_SCALE_UE8M0 are s

sglang.title: [UnifiedTree]: Fix SWA admission budget under-counts HiCache load-back consumption
sglang.author: hzh0425
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Under hybrid SWA + HiCache, the scheduler can OOM during prefill even though the admission budget check just passed. The failure path:
ScheduleBatch.add_one_req checks rem_swa_tokens against _swa_budget_for_req(...) (both outside and inside the tree lock).
After the gate succeeds, init_lo

sglang.title: [core] Probe `set_kv_buffer` / `set_mla_kv_buffer` slot ids for OOB
sglang.author: hnyls2002
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Summary

Add an async OOB probe on the KV-cache write path: set_kv_buffer / set_mla_kv_buffer now call maybe_detect_oob(loc, 0, self.size + self.page_size) before the store, across every writing pool (MHATokenToKVPool, MHATokenToKVPoolFP4, MLATokenToKVPool, MLATokenToKVPoolFP4).

Background

move_kv

sglang.title: Fix Req array token-id concatenation
sglang.author: mmangkad
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Summary
PR #25098 migrated scheduler token-id storage to array.array("q"), but some scheduler/cache paths still assumed list concatenation. This was hit when a request with existing generated tokens entered the next prefill round through Req.init_next_round_input.
TypeError: can only concatenate lis

sglang.title: [HiSparse & HiCache]Support mooncake store layer first layout
sglang.author: huangtingwei9988
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
This change adds Mooncake multi-buffer support for layer-first host KV layouts.We need this for two upcoming directions:
First, HiSparse will be compatible with HiCache, so decode nodes can enable HiSparse and HiCache at the same time. HiSparse currently requires layer-first layout becaus

sglang.title: [plugin] enable OOT platforms to provide custom quant configs
sglang.author: DevashishLal-CB
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
RFC: #26426
Motivation
Add a factory method to the SRTPlatform class enabling OOT platforms to provide custom quant configs that are resolved during init
Using custom quantization configs HW platforms can invoke there custom kernels for things like fp8 gemm, fp8 moe, etc.

Modifications

Accuracy Te

sglang.title: [Spec] Guard async-assert probes against `None` tensor
sglang.author: hnyls2002
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Summary

Treat a None tensor as nothing to check across all async_probe.py probes (maybe_detect_nan / maybe_detect_inf / maybe_detect_oob / maybe_detect_page_aligned)

Root cause

STANDALONE speculative decoding runs the draft model with capture_hidden_mode=NULL, so logits_output.hidden_states is le

sglang.title: [Bug] Fix out-of-range token id crashing tp=1 `VocabParallelEmbedding`
sglang.author: hnyls2002
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Summary

gen_radix_tree builds requests with random.randint(0, 32000) (inclusive), which can emit token id 32000 -- out of range for a 32000-vocab model (valid 0..31999)
At tp=1, VocabParallelEmbedding.forward does not mask input ids, so the bad id reaches F.embedding and crashes with a vectorized_g

sglang.title: [Diffusion] Precompute Ideogram4 denoising metadata
sglang.author: BBuf
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Summary

Precompute Ideogram4 logit-normal schedule values and per-step deltas before entering the denoising loop.
Precompute the positive/unconditional varlen attention masks and metadata once per request instead of rebuilding them on every transformer forward.
Keep the transformer fallback path co

vllm.title: [Bugfix][Voxtral] Add fetch_audio to MistralCommonFeatureExtractor (transformers>=5.10 compat)
vllm.author: Yadan-Wei
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
Fixes #44554. Loading any voxtral model under transformers>=5.10 raises:
AttributeError: 'MistralCommonFeatureExtractor' object has no attribute 'fetch_audio'

transformers 5.10.0 added a ProcessorMixin.prepare_inputs_layout helper (processing_utils.py:704) that calls self.feature_extractor.

vllm.title: [Bugfix][ROCm] `ApplyRotaryEmb`: fall back to native when flash_attn rotary grid would exceed the HIP per-dim limit
vllm.author: amd-fuweiy
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Summary
On AMD ROCm/HIP the per-dimension launch grid is capped at 65,535.
vllm/model_executor/layers/rotary_embedding/common.py::ApplyRotaryEmb.forward_hip
delegates to the flash_attn Triton rotary kernel, whose grid is
(cdiv(nheads, BLOCK_H), cdiv(seq_len, BLOCK_M), batch). With
BLOCK_M = 8 (the d

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Fix Qwen3.5-FP8 nightly fail. Guard fused_add_rms_norm input/weight dtype mismatch in RMSNorm + quant fusion
vllm.author: vadiklyutiy
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Summary
The nightly LM Eval Qwen3.5 Models (B200) — ci build #70074 job started failing on main, a regression introduced by #42646 "[perf] Add gemma RMS AR fusion". The RMSNorm + quant fusion's dtype guard only inspected rms_norm nodes, not fused_add_rms_norm nodes, so a GemmaRMSNorm (used by Qwen3.

vllm.title: [PERF] [Qwen3.5] Split mixed prefill+decode batches: route decodes to the recurrent kernel
vllm.author: vadiklyutiy
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Description
This PR has 3 changes:

Main: split mixed prefill+decode batches (see below).
Add MTP eval config for Qwen3.5-397B NVFP4.
Rename fast_kernel → aiter_kernel (fast_kernel was too general).

Problem
GDN attention ran all non-spec tokens through chunk_gated_delta_rule. Each decode becomes it

vllm.title: [ROCm][Perf] Fused MoE W4A16 HIP kernel for AMD RDNA3 (gfx1100)
vllm.author: JartX
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Summary
Native HIP kernel for W4A16 MoE on RDNA3 (gfx1100), replacing the Triton
fused_moe_kernel_gptq_awq path. It uses the same dequant + dot primitives as
the dense W4A16 kernel: v_dot2_f32_f16 / v_dot2_f32_bf16, exllama bit-trick
dequant, and 64-bit CAS atomic output.
What it does

Fused HIP ker

vllm.title: [BugFix] Resolve multiple async kv load deadlock
vllm.author: njhill
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This is a different fix for the issue targeted by #40968.
The changes are simpler and the resulting behavior should also be better - we avoid async-loading new kv if it would occupy blocks required for other in-flight chunked prefills or async-loading requests.
Note: we apply this throttle to async

vllm.title: [ROCm][MLA] Replace torch.cat in sparse-MLA forward_mqa with fused concat_mla_q
vllm.author: maeehart
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Summary
In the ROCm sparse-MLA backend, forward_mqa builds q = torch.cat([ql_nope, q_pe], dim=-1) once per layer per forward pass. On DeepSeek-V3.2 (61 sparse-MLA layers on the decode path) this adds up to 61 fresh tensor allocations and 61 aten::CatArrayBatchedCopy kernel launches per decode step,

This PR is to enable transparent sleep mode on XPU platform. It introduces changes:

get_mem_allocator to support both cuda_alike

FusedMoEKernel.__init__(). However, benchmarks/kernels/benchmark_moe.py
was not updated, so ru

vllm.title: [feature] add index share feature for DSA MTP
vllm.author: JaredforReal
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Summary
This PR implements IndexCache top-k index reuse for DeepSeek Sparse MLA's MTP Layer, inspired by IndexCache: Accelerating Sparse Attention via Cross-Layer Index Reuse.
The core idea is to avoid running the sparse attention indexer in every layer or every MTP speculative step when the top-k t

vllm.title: [Cohere] Enable Cohere Mini Code model and update Command A-plus test registry
vllm.author: Terrencezzj
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Turns on Cohere North-Mini-Code model (official name) withing vLLM code. The official HF repo will be CohereLabs/North-Mini-Code.
Cmd to run the model:
Install vLLM and dependencies
uv pip install -U vllm --torch-backend=auto
uv pip install cohere_melody>=0.9.0

Start server
vllm serve CohereLabs/No
